text:
(In reply to pyrus from comment #1)
Makefile at https://github.com/micadeyeye/freebsd-ports/blob/master/security/pidgin-lurch/Makefile .

I have received some valuable input from @Cy too. I shall try build these ports over my poudriere instance as time goes by.
